summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SCOI V1.1 with new Watchlist/Alert system. All backend APIs working (17/17 tests passed). Frontend testing successful with admin login, navigation, and new Watchlist features fully functional. Watchlist shows 2 watched entities (Mokwena + Mbokodo) with 4 active alerts as expected.

design_issues.issue: Search for 'Thabo' did not return Mokwena in results - may need more specific search terms

passed_tests: Backend health check (100% success rate - 17/17 tests)
Dashboard navigation with all tabs correctly positioned
Watchlist tab positioned between Asset Tracing and Red Flags
Watchlist system showing 2 watched entities (Mokwena + Mbokodo)
Watchlist alerts system with 4 active alerts
Alert types: Tender Awards, Asset Links, Red Flags
LLM integration with Gemini 2.5 Flash Lite working
All admin-only features accessible (Data Ingestion, Audit Logs)
